text:
As a content creator, starting an educational blog gives you a chance to expand your audience, grow your brand and build thought leadership especially when you're blogging about evergreen topics with a decent audience.

Many content creators have embraced educational blogging and it is working for them because there is always something to learn, context to explore and an audience ready to learn but; it is not all so rosy for beginners in this niche.

With recent innovation in technology, creating a well known brand in this niche from the scratch is becoming increasingly difficult. Unlike before, now you're now competing with AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude etc. And some of the things you'll ever think to post on your blogs can also be found on these platforms.

But regardless, there are ways you can start your own educational blog from scratch, grow it and built it into a notable brand, regardless of your location. And I am going to share the steps with you in the following paragraphs.

A social media manager is a digital marketing professional whose role is to manage a client's social media accounts, update posts, interact with the client's audience, respond to inquiries or carry out other tasks on social media on behalf of the client.

Unlike in the past, in most firms today, the role of a social media manager is clearly defined in most companies, with responsibilities, specific skill requirements and remuneration captured in the company's payroll.

Also, as companies continue to see the relevance of social media in customer acquisition and business growth, most brands now have specific requirements and expectations from prospective social media managers.

Luckily, there are also a lot of training, certifications, and experience-building opportunities available for social media managers, to get them prepared for their roles, making it easier for aspiring social media managers like you to get started with the right skills.

metadata.notes: English educational how-to guide about starting an educational blog and social media management - human written version
